title: Gitignore, help text, and documentation
description:
Housekeeping for the wrapup harness feature.

1. Verify .tick/.gitignore already covers logs/ (which includes wrapup-steps/ and wrapup-progress/). If not, add entries.
2. Verify .tick/wrapup.md itself is NOT gitignored — it's a committed project config file.
3. Update tk run --help long description to mention .tick/wrapup.md:
   'If .tick/wrapup.md exists, agent-driven wrapup steps run after shell steps from config.yaml.'
4. Add a brief section to README or existing docs explaining the wrapup.md feature.

Files: .tick/.gitignore, cmd/tk/cmd/run.go (help text)
closed_reason: Verified .tick/.gitignore already covers logs/ (wrapup-steps/ and wrapup-progress/ subdirs). Verified wrapup.md is NOT gitignored. Updated tk run --help Long description to mention .tick/wrapup.md. Added Wrapup Steps section to README.md explaining the feature and --skip-wrap-up flag.
